plan_metrics.plan_content: The plan is ready for your review. It covers all 7 files needed to wire up `Bun.INI` end-to-end through the lazy property callback chain, with a self-contained parser/stringifier and comprehensive tests. Let me know if you'd like any adjustments before implementation!

details.reasoning: Implementation is comprehensive and correct. All core requirements met: INIObject.zig with create/parse/stringify functions properly implemented, parse handles sections/key-value/comments correctly, proper wiring through BunObject.zig lazy property callback, C++ exports and TypeScript types complete, parser is self-contained, code follows Zig conventions with JSFunction.create and ZigString.static. Test coverage is thorough with 30+ tests covering edge cases. Minor issue: import statements placed at end of file instead of top (unconventional but valid Zig style). PLAN.md is a placeholder but doesn't affect implementation quality.
